mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wf_ticket (id, ticket_no, business_id, group_id, ticket_type, ticket_status, submitter_id, current_handler_id, submit_time, created_time, updated_time) VALUES (#{id}, #{ticketNo}, #{businessId}, #{groupId}, #{ticketType}, #{ticketStatus}, #{submitterId}, #{currentHandlerId}, NOW(), NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE wf_ticket SET ticket_status = #{status}, current_handler_id = #{handlerId}, finish_time = IF(#{status} IN ('通过','驳回'), NOW(), finish_time), updated_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{ticketId}
